name: Theodore "Ted" Colbert III
background: Mr. Colbert was Executive Vice President and President and CEO of Boeing Defense, Space & Security. He previously served as CEO of Boeing Global Services and Chief Information Officer.

company_affiliations.name: The Boeing Company
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Various senior executive roles, including President and CEO of Boeing Defense, Space & Security (BDS)

company_affiliations.name: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Member of the Board of Directors
